image_65538228f1531d.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"P(A\\mid B\\cap C)=\\frac{P(A\\cap B\\cap C)}{P(B\\cap C)}=\\frac{P(A)P(B)P(C)}{P(B)P(C)}=P(A)=P(A\\mid B)","note":"條件機率與獨立性公式"}

image_735b9d9fa5a0db.png.note: 集合機率加法公式計算
image_735b9d9fa5a0db.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"P(A\\cup B)=P(A)+P(B)-P(A\\cap B)=\\frac{1}{2}+\\frac{1}{3}-\\frac{1}{6}=\\frac{2}{3}","note":"集合機率加法公式計算"}
